title: Neil Armstrong's SECRET 2nd Expedition Exposed
summary: Jesse Michels discusses Neil Armstrong's lesser-known 1975 expedition to the Taos cave in Ecuador, which allegedly contained ancient alien metallic artifacts. The segment explores this as potential evidence of Armstrong's interest in extraterrestrial phenomena.

events.description: Neil Armstrong led an expedition to the Taos cave in Ecuador at the edge of the Amazon, searching for alleged ancient alien metallic artifacts. A BBC documentary crew followed him.

key_claims.claim: Neil Armstrong went on a second expedition in 1975 to a cave in Ecuador called the Taos cave, which was supposed to contain ancient alien metallic artifacts
A BBC documentary crew followed Neil Armstrong into the Taos cave
Neil Armstrong was not successful in finding the artifacts in the Taos cave
Luis Felipe San Salvador comes from a long line of conquistadors and has maps to the Taos cave
